exception_message: Cannot connect to proxy while requesting https://huggingface.co/nvidia/mit-b2/resolve/main/config.json
root_cause: The login node proxy could install packages from PyPI and download.pytorch.org but timed out when connecting to huggingface.co.
resolution: Support two verified files under external_assets/nvidia_mit_b2 and load them directly without Hugging Face network access.
